race.comment: OFF THE SCALE (10) improved sharply last start when second-up from a spell, racing handy then fighting hard to hold on for third over 1600m at Scone. Usually hits his straps at this stage of the prep and the longer journey looks to come at the right time. Worth following now. CAVALRY (4) settled just off the pace then let down with a mighty run to easily take out a maiden over a similar trip to this here last time out. Up significantly in grade but he is sparingly raced and has tremendous scope for improvement. THE BIG BLUE (7) had seven placings from eight runs before his long overdue maiden win over the mile at Hawkesbury recently. Finished third over this distance at Canterbury last prep so 1890m holds no fears. Should be competitive again despite taking on a deeper field. Last start Gosford maiden winner LUPA CAPITOLINA (13) has only been to the races five times and has plenty more to offer. FIORSUM FRED (6) is down in class and can turn around his recent failure.
